posts.author: Gaurav_Shivhare
posts.text: Hi everyone, sharing my notes and key takeaways from the recent Q4 and FY26 earnings call of Sanghvi Movers Limited. The company has posted its strongest year yet, driven by high asset utilization and a very promising pivot to the Middle East. Here is a breakdown of the business economics, sector tailwinds, and management guidance. 1. Financial Performance (FY26 & Q4) The company has shown excellent operating leverage as utilization levels peaked. Revenues: Q4 stood at ₹351 Cr (+31.4% YoY). Full FY26 revenue crossed the four-digit mark at ₹1,020 Cr (+36.9% YoY). EBITDA: Q4 EBITDA was ₹143 Cr (…

posts.text: Outlook India Sanghvi Movers Limited- The Cranes That Built Modern India Overview of Sanghvi Movers Limited, a crane rental company with over 450 cranes and operations across wind, cement, power, oil & gas, metro, and nuclear sectors in India, now expanding its services into EPC solutions and infrastructure projects. x.com @ image 588×746 39.7 KB
